description: Metadata-only inventory of every secret the platform tracks for rotation. Runtime freshness (last_rotated_at, age_days) is in the database (see `public.secret_inventory`) and exposed by /api/health/deep#secretRotation.

feature_flags.secrets.auto_rotate_tier_a: When ON, Tier A secrets are auto-rotated by the cron. Default OFF in production until first attended drill.
feature_flags.secrets.rotation_enforce: When ON, overdue Tier B/C alerts escalate to CRITICAL severity.

secrets.name: CRON_SECRET
secrets.description: Bearer token Vercel Cron presents to /api/cron/* endpoints (Wave 2 cron-guard). Pure random, no third-party dep.

secrets.name: METRICS_SECRET
secrets.description: Bearer token Prometheus uses to scrape /api/metrics. App-internal only.

secrets.name: BACKUP_LEDGER_SECRET
secrets.description: HMAC key over backup ledger entries (Wave 12). Rotation is safe because new entries get the new key and old verification keeps a key-history.

secrets.name: RESEND_API_KEY
secrets.description: Outbound transactional email. Rotation = create new key in Resend, update Vercel env, redeploy, revoke old key.

secrets.name: ASAAS_API_KEY
secrets.description: Payment gateway production key. Rotation requires Asaas portal access + Vercel env patch + redeploy.

secrets.name: ASAAS_WEBHOOK_SECRET
secrets.description: HMAC verifying Asaas webhooks. Updating it must be coordinated: change in Asaas portal, then in Vercel env, then redeploy. Window of ~30s where webhooks may 401.

secrets.name: ZENVIA_API_TOKEN
secrets.description: SMS / WhatsApp gateway. Rotation in Zenvia developer portal + Vercel env.

secrets.name: INNGEST_EVENT_KEY
secrets.description: Auth for events sent FROM the platform TO Inngest Cloud.

secrets.name: INNGEST_SIGNING_KEY
secrets.description: Validates requests FROM Inngest Cloud TO /api/inngest. Rotation must wait until Inngest queue drained.

secrets.name: CLICKSIGN_ACCESS_TOKEN
secrets.description: E-signature service token. Rotation in Clicksign portal + Vercel.

secrets.name: CLICKSIGN_WEBHOOK_SECRET
secrets.description: HMAC verifying Clicksign webhooks. Same care as ASAAS_WEBHOOK_SECRET.

secrets.name: NUVEM_FISCAL_CLIENT_SECRET
secrets.description: OAuth2 client secret for NF-e / NFS-e issuance.

secrets.name: VERCEL_TOKEN
secrets.description: Vercel API token used by the cron itself to PATCH envs. Rotation: create new in Vercel dashboard, update env, redeploy, delete old. CIRCULAR — must be done by an operator while the cron is paused.

secrets.name: TURNSTILE_SECRET_KEY
secrets.description: Cloudflare Turnstile widget secret. Rotation via Cloudflare dashboard or API.

secrets.name: SUPABASE_DB_PASSWORD
secrets.description: Postgres role password. Rotation forces every direct DB connection to drop. The cron NEVER auto-rotates this.

secrets.name: SUPABASE_JWT_SECRET
secrets.description: HS256 secret for every API call signed by Supabase Auth. Rotating invalidates EVERY active user session. Schedule a maintenance window.

secrets.name: FIREBASE_PRIVATE_KEY
secrets.description: Firebase Admin service account. Rotation requires creating a new service account in Firebase Console, copying the JSON, and patching three envs.

secrets.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
secrets.description: OpenAI billing key. Manual rotation per OpenAI policy.

secrets.name: ENCRYPTION_KEY
secrets.description: AES-256-GCM key for PII at rest (Wave 6). Rotation is a multi-week project: implement key versioning, re-encrypt every encrypted row with new key, retire old key. NEVER rotate naively.
